headline_marked: Ad-din Hospital's Licence Revoked After [[Six Newborn Deaths]] Prompt Investigation
headline: Ad-din Hospital's Licence Revoked After Six Newborn Deaths Prompt Investigation
summary: Bangladesh's Directorate General of Health Services has cancelled the licence of Ad-din Hospital in Dhaka following the deaths of six newborns. The decision came after the hospital's explanation for the deaths was found unsatisfactory.
details: The Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS) has cancelled the licence of Ad-din Hospital in Dhaka's Mogbazar area following the deaths of six newborn babies. The decision was communicated to the hospital's executive director in a letter sent on Thursday.

The cancellation follows an investigation into the deaths. The DGHS found the hospital's response to a show-cause notice, based on the investigation committee's report, to be unsatisfactory. The DGHS has requested the hospital to transfer all current patients to suitable nearby facilities.
Ad-din Hospital has the right to appeal the DGHS decision within 30 days. The incident raises serious concerns about patient safety and healthcare standards at the facility.
caption:
Six newborn babies have died, leading to the cancellation of Ad-din Hospital's licence by the Directorate General of Health Services.

The Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS) has cancelled the licence of Ad-din Hospital in Dhaka's Mogbazar area following the deaths of six newborn babies. The decision was communicated to the hospital's executive director in a letter sent on Thursday.

The cancellation follows an investigation into the deaths. The DGHS found the hospital's response to a show-cause notice, based on the investigation committee's report, to be unsatisfactory. The DGHS has requested the hospital to transfer all current patients to suitable nearby facilities.

Ad-din Hospital has the right to appeal the DGHS decision within 30 days. The incident raises serious concerns about patient safety and healthcare standards at the facility.

#AdDinHospital #Healthcare #Bangladesh #NewbornDeaths #DGHS

Source: Dhaka Tribune, Prothom Alo, Jamuna TV, bdnews24.com, The Daily Star
tweet: Ad-din Hospital's licence cancelled by DGHS after six newborns die. The hospital's explanation was found unsatisfactory following an investigation. Patients are being transferred. #Bangladesh #Healthcare
source: Dhaka Tribune, Prothom Alo, Jamuna TV, bdnews24.com, The Daily Star
